metadata.name: fogopulse
metadata.description: FOGO Pulse - Prediction market on FOGO chain

instructions.name: admin_close_config
docs: Close GlobalConfig account (admin only, testnet utility)
Used when GlobalConfig struct size changes and account needs recreation.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority — verified manually against account data

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig account to close — using UncheckedAccount to handle size mismatches

instructions.name: admin_close_epoch
docs: Close an epoch account (admin only, testnet utility)
Used to clean up orphaned epoch accounts after pool reinitialization.
Returns rent to admin.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - for PDA seed derivation
and the handler verifies epoch.owner == program_id.

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account to close — using UncheckedAccount to handle size mismatches

instructions.name: admin_close_lp_share
docs: Close a stale LpShare account (admin only, testnet utility)
Used after pool reinitialization to clean up orphaned LpShare accounts.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool reference — used only for PDA derivation

accounts.name: lp_share
docs: LpShare account to close — rent returned to admin

instructions.name: admin_close_pool
docs: Close a pool account (admin only, testnet utility)
Used when Pool struct size changes and accounts need to be recreated.
Returns rent to admin.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool account to close — using UncheckedAccount to handle size mismatches

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint for PDA derivation

instructions.name: admin_close_position
docs: Close a position account (admin only, testnet utility)
Used to clean up orphaned position accounts after pool reinitialization.
Old positions collide with new epoch PDAs and block new trades.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - for epoch PDA seed derivation
and position PDA is derived from epoch.key(). The handler verifies position.owner == program_id.

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - derived from pool + epoch_id, used for position PDA seed

accounts.name: position
docs: Position account to close — using UncheckedAccount to handle size mismatches

instructions.name: admin_force_close_epoch
docs: Force-close a stuck epoch (admin only)
Emergency instruction to clear a stuck epoch when settlement
is not yet implemented. Sets epoch state to Refunded and
clears pool.active_epoch to allow new epoch creation.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - validates admin authority

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - the stuck epoch to force-close

instructions.name: admin_sync_reserves
docs: Sync pool reserves with actual USDC token balance (admin only)
One-time utility to fix reserve accounting drift from Story 7.32 bug
(claim_payout/claim_refund not reducing reserves). Reads actual pool
USDC balance and sets reserves to balance/2 each.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - validates admin authority and freeze check

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool to sync reserves for — must not be frozen or have an active epoch

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account — read balance to determine actual USDC

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: advance_epoch
docs: Advance an epoch from Open to Frozen state
Permissionless instruction - anyone can call to advance an epoch that
has reached its freeze_time. This stops trading during the freeze window.
# Requirements
- Epoch must be in Open state
- Current time >= epoch.freeze_time
- Protocol and pool must not be frozen

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - must be in Open state

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

instructions.name: buy_position
docs: Buy a position in an epoch
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless trading.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless trading when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen, allow_hedging, fee parameters

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool being traded
Used to check: paused, frozen, reserves, active_epoch

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The epoch being traded in
Must be in Open state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position account - derived from USER wallet, not session
Uses init_if_needed to handle both new and existing positions

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA - must be owned by the actual user wallet
CRITICAL: When using FOGO Sessions, the session signer cannot authorize
token transfers from user's ATA. User must either:
1. Sign directly (not using session), OR
2. Pre-approve a delegate for their token account

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - owned by pool PDA
Receives net_amount + lp_fee (trading exposure + auto-compounding LP fee)

accounts.name: treasury_usdc
docs: Treasury USDC token account - receives 20% of fees
Must be ATA of config.treasury

accounts.name: insurance_usdc
docs: Insurance USDC token account - receives 10% of fees
Must be ATA of config.insurance

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: claim_payout
docs: Claim payout from a winning position
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless claims.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless claims when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool - for freeze checks, token transfer authority, and reserve updates
Mutable: reserves are reduced when payouts leave the pool (Story 7.32)

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The settled epoch - must be in Settled state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position to claim - derived from USER wallet, not session
Must match outcome direction and not be already claimed

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of payout)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (payout destination)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: claim_refund
docs: Claim refund from a refunded epoch
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless claims.
Returns original stake when epoch outcome is Refunded (exact tie).

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless claims when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration - for freeze checks

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool - for freeze checks, token transfer authority, and reserve updates
Mutable: reserves are reduced when refunds leave the pool (Story 7.32)

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The refunded epoch - must be in Refunded state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's position to refund - derived from USER wallet, not session
Boxed to prevent stack overflow with 11 accounts

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of refund)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (refund destination)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: crank_process_withdrawal
docs: Process a pending LP withdrawal (permissionless, for crank bots)
Unlike process_withdrawal which requires user/session signature,
this instruction can be called by anyone. The withdrawal was already
authorized by the user in request_withdrawal. USDC is sent to the
user's token account (not the caller).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Frozen check at constraint level (fail-fast before handler)

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool this LP position belongs to — mutable for reserve updates
Frozen check at constraint level (fail-fast before handler)

accounts.name: lp_share
docs: LP share account — user is derived from this account's data.
The `user` field is trusted because the PDA is program-owned.

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of withdrawal)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (withdrawal destination)
Owner verified against lp_share.user — USDC goes to LP, not caller

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: create_epoch
docs: Create a new epoch for a pool with verified Pyth Lazer oracle data
# Arguments
* `pyth_message` - Signed Pyth Lazer message bytes (Ed25519 format)
* `ed25519_instruction_index` - Index of Ed25519 verify instruction in transaction (typically 0)
* `signature_index` - Index of signature within Ed25519 instruction (typically 0)
# Transaction Structure (client-side)
```text
Transaction:
[0] Ed25519 signature verification instruction (MUST be first)
[1] create_epoch instruction (contains pyth_message)

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers
NOT using session extraction: no user identity matters here

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - boxed to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have no active epoch

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account to be created

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for Ed25519 signature verification

accounts.name: pyth_program
docs: Pyth Lazer Program (FOGO-specific)

accounts.name: pyth_storage
docs: Pyth Storage account (contains registered signers)

accounts.name: pyth_treasury
docs: Pyth Treasury account (receives verification fees)

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin authority - must match GlobalConfig.admin
NOT using session extraction: admin operations require direct wallet signature

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig account - boxed to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool will track (e.g., BTC mint address)
Admin is trusted to pass valid SPL token mints. Invalid mints create unusable
pools but pose no security risk (they're simply useless).

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool account to be created

instructions.name: deposit_liquidity
docs: Deposit USDC into a pool to receive LP shares
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless deposits.
Deposits are split 50/50 between YES and NO reserves.
LP shares are minted proportionally to the pool's reserve value.

docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().

accounts.name: config

Used to check: paused, frozen

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool receiving liquidity

accounts.name: lp_share
docs: LP share account - derived from USER wallet, not session
Uses init_if_needed to handle both new and existing LP positions

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - owned by pool PDA

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA - source of deposit

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: emergency_freeze
docs: Emergency freeze — halts ALL protocol activity
Sets global_config.frozen = true. All instructions except
this one are blocked when frozen.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin signer — verified via GlobalConfig.has_one

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig — admin verification AND target to freeze

instructions.name: pause_pool
docs: Pause a specific pool (admin only)
Sets pool.is_paused = true, preventing new epoch creation
and new trades. Existing epochs continue to settle normally.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin signer — verified via GlobalConfig.has_one

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig for admin verification

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool to pause — PDA with seeds ["pool", asset_mint]

instructions.name: process_withdrawal
docs: Process a pending LP withdrawal after cooldown
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless withdrawal processing.
Calculates USDC value from shares at current pool value,
transfers USDC to user, and burns the LP shares.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen
Frozen check at constraint level (fail-fast before handler), paused in handler

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool this LP position belongs to — mutable for reserve updates
Frozen check at constraint level (fail-fast before handler), paused in handler

accounts.name: lp_share
docs: LP share account — must exist (user must have deposited first)

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC token account (source of withdrawal)

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC token account (withdrawal destination)

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: request_withdrawal
docs: Request withdrawal of LP shares from a pool
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless withdrawal requests.
This only marks shares as pending — no token transfers occur.
Use process_withdrawal to complete the withdrawal after cooldown.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool this LP position belongs to — mutable to update pending_withdrawal_shares

accounts.name: lp_share
docs: LP share account — must exist (user must have deposited first)
NOT init_if_needed — requires existing deposit

instructions.name: resume_pool
docs: Resume a paused pool (admin only)
Sets pool.is_paused = false, allowing new epoch creation
and new trades to resume.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Admin signer — verified via GlobalConfig.has_one

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig for admin verification

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool to resume — PDA with seeds ["pool", asset_mint]

instructions.name: sell_position
docs: Sell a position before epoch settlement
Supports FOGO Sessions for gasless trading.

accounts.name: signer_or_session
docs: The user OR a session account representing the user.
Session validation is performed via extract_user().
This enables gasless trading when using FOGO Sessions.

accounts.name: config
docs: Global protocol configuration
Used to check: paused, frozen, fee parameters

accounts.name: pool
docs: The pool being traded
Used to check: paused, frozen, reserves; also PDA signer for transfers

accounts.name: epoch
docs: The epoch being traded in
Must be in Open state

accounts.name: position
docs: User's existing position - derived from USER wallet, not session
Must have shares to sell

accounts.name: user_usdc
docs: User's USDC ATA - receives net_payout

accounts.name: pool_usdc
docs: Pool's USDC ATA - source of all transfers

accounts.name: treasury_usdc
docs: Treasury USDC token account - receives treasury_fee

accounts.name: insurance_usdc
docs: Insurance USDC token account - receives insurance_fee

accounts.name: usdc_mint
docs: USDC mint - verified against constant

instructions.name: settle_epoch
docs: Settle an epoch with verified Pyth Lazer oracle data
Permissionless instruction - anyone can call to settle an epoch that
has reached its end_time and is in Frozen state.
# Arguments
* `pyth_message` - Signed Pyth Lazer message bytes (Ed25519 format)
* `ed25519_instruction_index` - Index of Ed25519 verify instruction in transaction (typically 0)
* `signature_index` - Index of signature within Ed25519 instruction (typically 0)
# Transaction Structure (client-side)
```text
Transaction:
[0] Ed25519 signature verification instruction (MUST be first)
[1] settle_epoch instruction (contains pyth_message)
# Outcome Determination
- If settlement_price == start_price: Refunded (tie)
- If settlement_price > start_price: Up wins
- If settlement_price < start_price: Down wins
Note: Oracle data quality is gated by the BPS-based confidence threshold
check. If settlement confidence is too wide, the instruction rejects
(epoch stays in Settling state for crank retry).

accounts.name: payer
docs: Anyone can call - permissionless for crank bots/keepers

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - for oracle thresholds and freeze checks
IMPORTANT: Use Box<> to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active
IMPORTANT: Use Box<> to prevent stack overflow

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - must be in Frozen state and past end_time

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for Ed25519 signature verification

accounts.name: pyth_program
docs: Pyth Lazer Program (FOGO-specific)

accounts.name: pyth_storage
docs: Pyth Storage account (contains registered signers)

accounts.name: pyth_treasury
docs: Pyth Treasury account (receives verification fees)

instructions.name: timeout_force_close_epoch
docs: Permissionless timeout force-close for stuck Frozen epochs
When a Frozen epoch has been stuck past `end_time + settlement_timeout_seconds`,
anyone can call this to force-close it as Refunded. No oracle data needed.

accounts.name: payer
docs: Permissionless caller - pays for transaction fees

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - provides settlement_timeout_seconds

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool - must have this epoch as active

accounts.name: epoch
docs: Epoch - the stuck epoch to force-close

accounts.name: clock
docs: Clock sysvar for timestamp check
Note: Could use Clock::get()? instead to save an account slot,
but kept as explicit account for consistency with deployed program.

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update protocol configuration (admin only)
Allows admin to modify GlobalConfig parameters like oracle thresholds,
fee settings, and feature flags. Only provided fields are updated.

accounts.name: admin
docs: Protocol admin - must match GlobalConfig.admin

accounts.name: global_config
docs: GlobalConfig - the account to update

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized - admin signature required

errors.name: AlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: GlobalConfig already initialized

errors.name: InvalidFeeShare
errors.msg: Invalid fee share - must sum to 10000 bps

errors.name: InvalidCap
errors.msg: Invalid cap value - must be between 0 and 10000 bps

errors.name: InvalidTradingFee
errors.msg: Invalid trading fee - must be between 0 and 1000 bps (10%)

errors.name: InvalidTimingParams
errors.msg: Invalid timing parameters - freeze window must be less than epoch duration, epoch must be at least 60 seconds

errors.name: InvalidOracleThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid oracle threshold - must be between 1 and 10000 bps

errors.name: ProtocolPaused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused - no new operations allowed

errors.name: ProtocolFrozen
errors.msg: Protocol is frozen - emergency halt active

errors.name: PoolPaused
errors.msg: Pool is paused - no new epochs allowed

errors.name: PoolFrozen
errors.msg: Pool is frozen - emergency halt active

errors.name: EpochAlreadyActive
errors.msg: Cannot create epoch - active epoch exists

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: OracleVerificationFailed
errors.msg: Oracle verification failed - signature invalid or untrusted signer

errors.name: OracleDataInvalid
errors.msg: Oracle data invalid - failed to deserialize message

errors.name: OraclePriceMissing
errors.msg: Oracle price missing - no price data in payload

errors.name: OracleDataStale
errors.msg: Oracle data stale - publish time exceeds staleness threshold

errors.name: OracleConfidenceTooWide
errors.msg: Oracle confidence too wide - exceeds confidence threshold

errors.name: OracleExponentMissing
errors.msg: Oracle exponent missing - exponent property not found in payload

errors.name: SessionExtractionFailed
errors.msg: Session extraction failed - invalid, expired, or unauthorized session

errors.name: InvalidEpoch
errors.msg: Invalid epoch reference

errors.name: AlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Position already claimed

errors.name: NotImplemented
errors.msg: Instruction not yet implemented

errors.name: EpochNotOpen
errors.msg: Epoch is not in Open state

errors.name: ExceedsWalletCap
errors.msg: Exceeds per-wallet position cap

errors.name: ExceedsSideCap
errors.msg: Exceeds per-side exposure cap

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient token balance

errors.name: InvalidDirection
errors.msg: Cannot open opposite direction - hedging disabled

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: TokenOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Token account owner does not match expected user

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Token account mint does not match expected mint

errors.name: BelowMinimumTrade
errors.msg: Trade amount below minimum required

errors.name: AboveMaximumTrade
errors.msg: Trade amount exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: InvalidEpochState
errors.msg: Invalid epoch state for this operation

errors.name: EpochNotEnded
errors.msg: Epoch has not reached end_time yet

errors.name: EpochNotFrozen
errors.msg: Epoch has not reached freeze_time yet

errors.name: PositionNotWinner
errors.msg: Position is not on the winning side

errors.name: InsufficientShares
errors.msg: Position does not have enough shares to sell

errors.name: ZeroShares
errors.msg: Shares amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InsufficientPoolReserves
errors.msg: Pool does not have sufficient reserves for this sell

errors.name: PoolEmpty
errors.msg: Pool has no liquidity

errors.name: DepositTooSmall
errors.msg: Deposit too small - would mint zero LP shares

errors.name: WithdrawalAlreadyPending
errors.msg: A withdrawal request is already pending

errors.name: NoPendingWithdrawal
errors.msg: No pending withdrawal to process

errors.name: CooldownNotElapsed
errors.msg: Withdrawal cooldown period has not elapsed

errors.name: WithdrawalTooSmall
errors.msg: Withdrawal too small - would transfer zero USDC

errors.name: WithdrawalBlockedDuringEpoch
errors.msg: Withdrawal cannot be processed during an active epoch - will be processed after settlement

errors.name: SettlementTimeoutNotReached
errors.msg: Settlement timeout not yet reached

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who updated the config

fields.name: config
docs: GlobalConfig account pubkey

fields.name: fields_updated
docs: Bitmask of which fields were updated (for efficient indexing)
Bit positions: 0=treasury, 1=insurance, 2=trading_fee, 3=lp_fee,
4=treasury_fee, 5=insurance_fee, 6=wallet_cap, 7=side_cap,
8=confidence_start, 9=confidence_settle, 10=staleness_start,
11=staleness_settle, 12=epoch_duration, 13=freeze_window,
14=allow_hedging, 15=paused, 16=frozen, 17=max_trade_amount,
18=settlement_timeout_seconds

fields.name: per_wallet_cap_bps
docs: Maximum position per wallet in basis points of pool (e.g., 500 = 5%)

fields.name: per_side_cap_bps
docs: Maximum exposure per side in basis points of pool (e.g., 3000 = 30%)

fields.name: oracle_confidence_threshold_start_bps
docs: Max confidence ratio for epoch start in basis points (e.g., 25 = 0.25%)

fields.name: oracle_confidence_threshold_settle_bps
docs: Max confidence ratio for settlement in basis points (e.g., 80 = 0.8%)

fields.name: oracle_staleness_threshold_start
docs: Max oracle age in seconds for epoch start (e.g., 3)

fields.name: oracle_staleness_threshold_settle
docs: Max oracle age in seconds for settlement (e.g., 10)

fields.name: epoch_duration_seconds
docs: Epoch duration in seconds (e.g., 300 = 5 minutes)

fields.name: freeze_window_seconds
docs: Freeze window before settlement in seconds (e.g., 15)

fields.name: allow_hedging
docs: If true, users can hold both UP and DOWN positions in same epoch

fields.name: paused
docs: Pause new epoch creation globally

fields.name: frozen
docs: Emergency freeze - halts ALL activity

fields.name: max_trade_amount
docs: Maximum trade amount in USDC lamports (6 decimals)
e.g., 100_000_000 = $100 USDC. Admin-configurable via update_config.

fields.name: settlement_timeout_seconds
docs: Seconds after end_time before permissionless timeout force-close is allowed
Default: 60 (1 minute). Must be > 0.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who deposited liquidity

fields.name: amount
docs: USDC amount deposited

fields.name: shares_minted
docs: LP shares minted for this deposit

fields.name: total_lp_shares_after
docs: Total LP shares in pool after deposit

fields.name: yes_reserves_after
docs: YES reserves after deposit

fields.name: no_reserves_after
docs: NO reserves after deposit

types.name: LpShare
docs: LpShare account - tracks a user's LP position within a specific pool
PDA Seeds: ["lp_share", user.key(), pool.key()]

fields.name: user
docs: Wallet address of the LP

fields.name: pool
docs: Reference to the pool this LP position is in

fields.name: shares
docs: LP shares currently owned (proportional to pool value)

fields.name: deposited_amount
docs: Total USDC deposited over time (for tracking, not share calculation)

fields.name: pending_withdrawal
docs: Shares pending withdrawal (locked during cooldown)

fields.name: withdrawal_requested_at
docs: Timestamp when withdrawal was requested (None if no pending withdrawal)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

types.name: Outcome
docs: Final outcome of an epoch after settlement

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who claimed the payout

fields.name: amount
docs: Payout amount in USDC lamports (original stake + winnings)

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of the winning position

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool tracks (e.g., BTC mint address)

fields.name: yes_reserves
docs: YES token reserves (USDC backing YES positions)

fields.name: no_reserves
docs: NO token reserves (USDC backing NO positions)

fields.name: total_lp_shares
docs: Total LP shares issued for this pool

fields.name: pending_withdrawal_shares
docs: Total LP shares pending withdrawal across all LPs (updated on request/process)

fields.name: next_epoch_id
docs: Counter for next epoch creation (starts at 0)

fields.name: active_epoch
docs: Current active epoch PDA, or None if no active epoch

fields.name: active_epoch_state
docs: Cached state: 0=None, 1=Open, 2=Frozen

fields.name: wallet_cap_bps
docs: Max position per wallet in basis points (copied from GlobalConfig at creation)

fields.name: side_cap_bps
docs: Max exposure per side in basis points (copied from GlobalConfig at creation)

fields.name: is_paused
docs: Pool-level pause flag (blocks new trades/epochs)

fields.name: is_frozen
docs: Pool-level freeze flag (emergency halt)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool tracks

fields.name: wallet_cap_bps
docs: Max position per wallet in basis points (copied from GlobalConfig)

fields.name: side_cap_bps
docs: Max exposure per side in basis points (copied from GlobalConfig)

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool tracks

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who paused the pool

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch that triggered the rebalancing

fields.name: yes_reserves_before
docs: YES reserves before rebalancing

fields.name: no_reserves_before
docs: NO reserves before rebalancing

fields.name: yes_reserves_after
docs: YES reserves after rebalancing (gets remainder if odd total)

fields.name: no_reserves_after
docs: NO reserves after rebalancing

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: asset_mint
docs: Asset mint this pool tracks

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who resumed the pool

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User wallet that opened the position

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of the position (Up or Down)

fields.name: amount
docs: Amount in USDC (lamports, 6 decimals)

fields.name: shares
docs: Shares received from CPMM calculation

fields.name: entry_price
docs: Entry price per share (for PnL calculations)

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when position was opened

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who sold the position

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of the position (Up or Down)

fields.name: shares_sold
docs: Number of shares sold

fields.name: gross_refund
docs: Gross refund before fees

fields.name: net_payout
docs: Net payout after fees (sent to user)

fields.name: remaining_shares
docs: Remaining shares after sell (0 if full exit)

fields.name: remaining_amount
docs: Remaining amount after sell (0 if full exit)

fields.name: is_full_exit
docs: Whether this was a full exit (all shares sold)

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of the sell

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who triggered the freeze

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp when protocol was frozen

fields.name: epoch
docs: Epoch account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who claimed the refund

fields.name: amount
docs: Refund amount in USDC lamports

types.name: RefundReason
docs: Reason for epoch refund (for event logging)

types.name: UpdateConfigParams
docs: Parameters for updating config - all fields optional
Only provided fields will be updated

types.name: UserPosition
docs: UserPosition account - tracks a user's position within a specific epoch
PDA Seeds: ["position", epoch.key(), user.key(), direction_byte]

fields.name: user
docs: Wallet address of the position holder

fields.name: epoch
docs: Reference to the epoch this position is in

fields.name: direction
docs: Direction of the prediction (Up or Down)

fields.name: amount
docs: Position size in USDC (lamports, 6 decimals)

fields.name: shares
docs: Shares received from CPMM calculation

fields.name: entry_price
docs: Price paid per share at entry (for PnL calculations)

fields.name: claimed
docs: Whether payout or refund has been claimed

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who processed withdrawal

fields.name: shares_burned
docs: Number of LP shares burned

fields.name: usdc_amount
docs: USDC amount transferred to user

fields.name: total_lp_shares_after
docs: Total LP shares in pool after withdrawal

fields.name: yes_reserves_after
docs: YES reserves after withdrawal

fields.name: no_reserves_after
docs: NO reserves after withdrawal

fields.name: pool
docs: Pool account pubkey

fields.name: user
docs: User who requested withdrawal

fields.name: shares_amount
docs: Number of LP shares requested for withdrawal

fields.name: total_shares
docs: Total LP shares user holds (including pending)

fields.name: timestamp
docs: Unix timestamp of the request
